# Copilot Instructions

Before responding to any request that involves reading, writing, or reasoning about this codebase, read `CLAUDE.md` in the repository root. It is short. It is mandatory. It contains the orientation and process rules that govern all work in this repo.

Your first response to any implementation request must be a plan — no code, no file edits, no shell commands — ending with the exact phrase "Awaiting your approval to proceed." Do not take any implementation action until the user replies to that plan.
